markdownRemark.html:
Selection mode, optional values: false, 'multiple', 'single'. Default is 'multiple'

Basic Usage

const dataSet = new DataSet({
  // 'multiple' is the default value
  selection: 'multiple',
  fields: [
    { name: 'name', type: 'string' },
    { name: 'age', type: 'number' },
  ],
});

Note: The selection property determines whether records in the DataSet can be selected, and whether single or multiple records can be selected.

Related

Table selectionMode and alwaysShowRowBox API

Property Description Type Default
selectionMode Mode for selecting records, optional values: rowbox | treebox | click | dblclick | mousedown | none string rowbox
alwaysShowRowBox Whether to always show the rowbox. When enabled, the rowbox will be shown in other modes as well. When selectionMode is rowbox or dblclick, the checkbox is always visible boolean false

Explanation of property combinations

Summary of record selection:

  • When the DataSet selection property is false:

    • Regardless of the values of the Table component's selectionMode and alwaysShowRowBox properties, records cannot be selected and checkboxes do not appear.
  • When the DataSet selection property is multiple or single, records can be selected:
  • When the selectionMode of the Table component is rowbox or dblclick, the checkboxes are usually visible.
  • When the selectionMode of the Table component is treebox, and the component contains tree-structured data, the checkboxes are usually visible.
  • When the selectionMode of the Table component is set to other values, the checkboxes are displayed according to the alwaysShowRowBox property.

  • The selectionMode property of the Table component determines how table records are selected and affects the display of the checkboxes, but it does not affect whether records in the DataSet can be selected.

    • When selectionMode is click, dblclick, or mousedown, it means records can also be selected by interacting directly with the table rows themselves. For other values, records can only be selected via checkboxes.

Summary of Checkbox Display:

  • The table below shows the visibility of checkboxes in the Table component when the DataSet's selection property is multiple or single, based on the combination of selectionMode and alwaysShowRowBox settings:
selectionMode alwaysShowRowBox: false alwaysShowRowBox: true
rowbox Yes Yes
treebox Display for tree-structured data with cascading selection;
Does not display for non-tree data		 Yes
click No Yes
dblclick Yes Yes
mousedown No Yes
none No Yes

Others

In other components, such as Select, Tree, Cascader, etc., the selection property in the DataSet affects the selection mode.

Give it a try

By toggling the selection, selectionMode, and alwaysShowRowBox property values, observe whether records can be selected and whether checkboxes are displayed.

Open the browser's developer tools console, select records in the table, and then click the button in the top right corner of the table to view the selected records in the console.
